visualizerParams.title: Go: Variables
visualizerParams.description: Learn Go basics by implementing variables.
visualizerParams.ghostCode:
package main

import "fmt"

func main() {
	var name string = "CodeVarsity"
	age := 5
	isLearning := true

	fmt.Printf("Name: %s, Age: %d, Learning: %t\n", name, age, isLearning)
}
visualizerParams.finalCode:
package main

import "fmt"

func main() {
	var name string = "CodeVarsity"
	age := 5
	isLearning := true

	fmt.Printf("Name: %s, Age: %d, Learning: %t\n", name, age, isLearning)
}
